enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Nillayo?

The song Nillayo expresses deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love, highlighting the emotions associated with longing and affection.

What is the context of this song in the movie Bairavaa?

In Bairavaa, the song plays during a romantic sequence that showcases the lead characters' love story, enhancing the emotional depth of the narrative.

Who is the singer of Nillayo?

The singer for Nillayo is currently unknown, but the song features the lyrical genius of Vairamuthu and the music direction of Santhosh Narayanan.

When was Nillayo released?

Nillayo was released on December 19, 2016, as part of the Bairavaa soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Nillayo from Bairavaa beautifully encapsulates the feelings of love and longing. With its soothing melody and poetic lyrics by Vairamuthu, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and romance. The song serves as a backdrop to a pivotal romantic moment in the film, enhancing the emotional connection between the characters. Overall, it resonates with anyone who has experienced the joys and pains of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Nillayo from Bairavaa captures the essence of romance with its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics. The collaboration of Vairamuthu's poetic brilliance and Santhosh Narayanan's enchanting composition makes this song a must-listen. Dive into a world of love and emotion with this beautiful track that resonates with every romantic soul.
stanzaMeanings: a yellow cloud is going ahead like a small girl
my body and my soul will follow her name
I saw a flower, I found life in the small girl
stay still, stay still, what is your name, I forgot because of you
I see a dream, when I see it, is it a dream, God is watching me
the wind's body is like a poet's verse, we are from the land of honey
silicon is shining, the small river flows, the moon is outside
stay still, stay still, what is your name, I forgot because of you
the golden shine is beautiful, she is like a goddess, she is a girl in the light
I have not seen the girl I love, no one has taken half of my life
there is no way to escape from the past, if I can't, I will be lifted up
stay still, stay still, what is your name, I forgot because of you
